name: trace-mcp-bridge
description: MCP server that exposes search_cold_archive for Trace (Lambda HTTP API).

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none dist/index.test.js dist/lib/app-api.test.js dist/lib/embeddings.test.js dist/lib/explanations.test.js dist/lib/filters.test.js dist/lib/mcp-tool.test.js dist/lib/search-client.test.js dist/lib/secrets.test.js
